query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles, COUNT(CASE WHEN pillar = 'Theological Depth' THEN 1 END) as theological_depth_count FROM posts WHERE title LIKE '%Heaven%' OR title LIKE '%Rapture%' OR title LIKE '%Eschatology%' OR title LIKE '%Genesis%' OR title LIKE '%Evolution%' OR title LIKE '%Creation%' OR title LIKE '%Science%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R8Hw4VBpxrrDge.root --database KoRED62UaUJB6FH9jFpuEG --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_articles, COUNT(CASE WHEN pillar = 'Theological Depth' THEN 1 END) as theological_depth_count FROM posts WHERE title LIKE '%Heaven%' OR title LIKE '%Rapture%' OR title LIKE '%Eschatology%' OR title LIKE '%Genesis%' OR title LIKE '%Evolution%' OR title LIKE '%Creation%' OR title LIKE '%Science%'
